behavior_lens.ai.print_disclaimer: The AI-generated content in this section is a heuristic estimate, not the professional judgment of a BCBA or licensed clinician. Verify all claims with direct observation before sharing with parents, IEP teams, or administrators.
behavior_lens.confirm.remove_counter: Remove this counter? You'll lose ${count} tallies that haven't been saved as a session.
behavior_lens.confirm.remove_contact: Remove "${label}" from the crisis plan? This can't be undone.
behavior_lens.confirm.delete_self_check: Delete the self-check from ${when}? This can't be undone.
behavior_lens.toast.snapshot_too_large: Snapshot exceeds the ${SNAPSHOT_MAX_ENTRIES.toLocaleString()}-entry safety limit; refusing to import.
behavior_lens.toast.snapshot_rejected_en: Skipped ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} malformed entries (missing/invalid timestamp or wrong field types). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} valid entries kept for review.
behavior_lens.ui.safety_reflection_check: Safety reflection checklist — not a validated threat assessment instrument
behavior_lens.ui.formal_threat_assessmen: For formal threat assessment, refer to your district\'s protocol (VTA, STAG, or NTAC frameworks).
behavior_lens.toast.transcript_no_json: AI did not return a parseable list of entries.
behavior_lens.toast.transcript_bad_json: AI returned malformed JSON; please rephrase the transcript and try again.
behavior_lens.toast.transcript_not_array: AI returned a single object instead of an entry list; wrapping it for review.
behavior_lens.toast.transcript_no_valid_: AI list contained no valid ABC entries.
behavior_lens.toast.share_code_too_large: Snapshot too large for share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, limit 5,000). Use 💾 Download Snapshot instead.
behavior_lens.toast.ai_disabled: 🤖 AI is off — toggle it on in the header to use this feature
behavior_lens.hub.riskscreen_desc_v2: Safety reflection checklist + AI pattern detection (not a formal threat-assessment instrument)
behavior_lens.hub.opdef_desc_v2: Turn vague descriptions into observable, measurable definitions using standard ABA dimensions + the Dead Man\'s Test (AI-assisted, not a BACB-credentialed output)
behavior_lens.toast.ai_turned_off: 🤖 AI turned OFF — no student data will be sent to Gemini
behavior_lens.ai.toggle_title_on: AI ON — student data is sent to Gemini for analysis. Click to turn off.
behavior_lens.ai.toggle_title_off: AI OFF — no student data leaves this browser. Click to enable.
behavior_lens.ai.consent_subtitle: Before turning on AI features, please read what gets sent to Google Gemini.
behavior_lens.ai.consent_li_abc: ABC entries (antecedent, behavior, consequence, intensity, notes, setting) — for the active student
behavior_lens.ai.consent_li_profile: Student profile (strengths, interests, triggers, goals, accommodations, notes)
behavior_lens.ai.consent_li_obs: Observation session summaries and recent session notes
behavior_lens.ai.consent_li_codename: The student codename you have chosen (NOT a real name unless you typed one in)
behavior_lens.ai.consent_li_no_other_stu: Data for any student other than the active one
behavior_lens.ai.consent_li_no_cloud_cre: Your Firebase/cloud credentials, school account, or device identifiers
behavior_lens.ai.consent_li_no_real_name: Real student names (unless you typed one into the codename field)
behavior_lens.ai.consent_ferpa_note: FERPA reminder: do not type students\' real names into BehaviorLens. Use a codename (e.g. "Brave Otter"). You can revoke this consent at any time by clicking the AI toggle in the header.
behavior_lens.toast.ai_turned_on: 🤖 AI turned ON — student data will be sent to Gemini for analysis
